mapper.update:
UPDATE pets
name = #{virtualPet.name},
experience = #{virtualPet.experience},
level = #{virtualPet.level},
punch_date = #{virtualPet.punchDate},
number_of_punch_outs = #{virtualPet.numberOfPunchOuts}
WHERE id = #{virtualPet.id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM pets WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, user_id, name, experience, level, created_at, punch_date, number_of_punch_outs FROM pets WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT experience FROM pets WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT punch_date FROM pets WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT number_of_punch_outs FROM pets WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT accepted FROM pet_phrases WHERE pet_id = #{id}
SELECT wrong_answer FROM pet_phrases WHERE pet_id = #{id}
SELECT time_limit_exceeded FROM pet_phrases WHERE pet_id = #{id}
SELECT compile_error FROM pet_phrases WHERE pet_id = #{id}
SELECT runtime_error FROM pet_phrases WHERE pet_id = #{id}
SELECT internal_error FROM pet_phrases WHERE pet_id = #{id}
SELECT exec_format_error FROM pet_phrases WHERE pet_id = #{id}
SELECT memory_out_of_range FROM pet_phrases WHERE pet_id = #{id}
SELECT name FROM pets WHERE id = #{id}
